use_cases: Displaying product or service features in a clean card-based grid layout
Presenting benefits and capabilities with structured card components
Building feature sections for landing pages and marketing sites
Organizing informational content with consistent card styling
Creating reusable feature blocks that can be customized with different content
ai_summary: A set of modular Card UI components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) from the shadcn/ui design system, exported for composable use. These atomic card elements are typically combined to create feature showcase sections that display product benefits, capabilities, or service offerings in a structured, visually consistent grid or list layout. The components use Tailwind CSS for styling with standard shadow-sm and border treatments for a clean, professional appearance.
